operations engagement and production release, while working with

via pull requests.

Database Management: Experience with SQL Server. Knowledge of other relational databases like PostgreSQL or MySQL (using SQL) and NoSQL solutions like MongoDB or Redis is preferable.

- System Design: The ability to design scalable, maintainable architectures, often involving microservices or API-first (REST) approaches. Proficiency in designing and consuming APIs, including handling authentication, versioning, rate limiting, and error handling.

MDCM is a University level annual competition that attracts more than a dozen teams seeking to create a data model that would predict the results of the NCAA men’s basketball tournament. The competition was spread out over a number of weeks, with historical data on the tournament being released to students in February and this year’s team data given out in March. Using scikit-learn, a machine learning python package, about 2,000 lines of codes were written to perform data cleaning, model building and output visualization. The data model predicted with a high accuracy of 78%, compared with 73% for last year’s winner. Among the techniques used to improve the model were feature engineering, algorithm optimization, cross validation, and model ensemble, Show less

results.title: Adeel Syed
highlights:
Software Manager at [Public Storage](https://www.linkedin.com/company/public-storage)
...
A dynamic and seasoned Principal Software Engineer with over two decades of comprehensive experience in designing, developing, and optimizing complex software systems. Specializing in.NET framework, Agile methodologies, and software architecture & integration, my career is marked by spearheading innovative solutions that drive efficiency, scalability, and system reliability. My expertise spans across leading multidisciplinary teams, implementing process improvements, and delivering high-impact software projects that align with strategic business goals. In my tenure at Public Storage, I led the transformation of the chargeback process by developing sophisticated algorithms to automate chargebacks, addressing an array of financial edge cases. This innovation propelled the company to process 100% of chargebacks automatically, unlocking nearly half a million dollars in monthly revenue. At Public Storage, I led backend job efficiency by creating a generic, lightweight ETL tool, now instrumental in running 16 business-critical jobs. This tool drastically reduced the development and QA cycle from 2 weeks to mere minutes per job. By adhering to SOLID principles, I ensured the utility's adaptability and growth, marking a significant leap in backend process optimization. During an urgent crisis where a deployment error had jeopardized our company-wide inventory system, my ability to quickly diagnose and resolve the issue minimized potential revenue loss and preserved stakeholder trust. This experience underscored my problem-solving skills and my capacity to maintain composure and deliver under pressure, reinforcing my role as a reliable and resourceful leader in critical situations. Eager to bring my expertise in leading software development teams and designing scalable solutions to new challenges. If my approach to driving technical excellence aligns with your needs, I would love to hear from you. Contact me at adeel.syed@gmail.com Key Skills: C#,.NET, Agile Methodologies, Software Architecture Design, SDLC, Microsoft SQL Server, Process Improvement
...
At Public Storage, I've been pivotal in deploying over 50 high-quality applications, leading the software development lifecycle from conception to maintenance. My role involved steering four Scrum teams, ensuring agile methodologies, and overseeing critical software areas, including POS and call center operations, to significantly enhance system functionality and business operations. Spearheaded the re-platforming of the call center infrastructure, transitioning to a more robust provider and implementing custom IVR and API solutions. This initiative not only resolved longstanding infrastructure reliability issues but also dramatically improved service quality, marking a turning point in customer support and operational efficiency. Led the development of a flexible Micro-ETL application for automated decryption and data transformation, which became essential in optimizing process efficiency across multiple programs. This innovation reduced operational time from weeks to hours, demonstrating my ability to drive significant improvements in system scalability and performance. Relevant Skills: Agile Leadership, System Architecture Design, Process Automation, Scalability Optimization, Continuous Improvement Show less

results.title: Public Storage's 20% gain: NSA acquisition and data-science partnership drive margin capture | Chris Berg posted on the topic | LinkedIn
highlights:
Public Storage's 20% gain: NSA acquisition and data-science partnership drive margin capture | Chris Berg posted on the topic | LinkedIn
...
# Public Storage's 20% gain: NSA acquisition and data-science partnership drive margin capture
...
Public Storage is up nearly 20% this year. The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq are both behind it. A storage REIT outrunning the Nasdaq in a tech-led market should make you stop scrolling. Because this is not a rent-growth story. PSA's own 2026 guidance still calls for flat-to-negative same-store revenue. So what is the market actually paying for? Two things. And most people are only looking at one of them. First, the NSA acquisition. PSA is buying the #5 operator in a $10.5B deal that adds 30% more properties and 27% more square feet. But the number that matters isn't size — it's the gap. NSA runs a 69.4% NOI margin. PSA runs 78.2%. That's an 880-basis-point spread sitting inside the same asset class (PSA June 2026 company update). The entire deal thesis is: drop NSA's properties onto PSA's platform and close that gap. Management models $110–130M in synergies and up to $0.50 of FFO accretion by 2029. Second — and this is the part the market is quietly repricing — the Welltower data-science partnership. PSA put it on one line in the deck. I'd put it on the cover. Because an 880-bps margin capture is only credible if you have the operating system to execute it. AI-enhanced pricing, data-science underwriting, a digital-first platform pushing toward 95% digital transactions — that is what makes the synergy math believable instead of aspirational. Here's the operator's read: the stock isn't up on demand. It's up on platform-driven margin capture. The smart money is paying for the operating system, not the rent roll. That's the whole game now. Whoever underwrites with the best data wins the margin. Whoever doesn't, overpays — and finds out in 2028. The largest operator in the world just told you where the edge is. I built StorageDemandScore.com for exactly this reason: to underwrite a market before someone else does it better.
...

Western Digital Extends Massive Rally as AI Storage Demand Continues to Surge Western Digital (WDC) stock continued its remarkable run on Thursday, adding another 7.79% and bringing its five-day gain to 46.65%. The rally has been fueled by growing expectations that storage hardware will remain in short supply as AI data center construction accelerates. While GPUs often receive the most attention in the AI boom, storage infrastructure is becoming an increasingly critical component of the industry's growth. Analysts believe demand is outpacing supply. Morgan Stanley's Erik Woodring recently projected annual hard disk drive (HDD) demand growth of 40% to 50%, well above expected supply growth of 30% to 35%. That outlook prompted him to assign a Buy rating and a $650 price target on WDC. J.P. Morgan's Samik Chatterjee also reiterated a Buy rating with the same $650 target. What's notable is how quickly Western Digital's rally has overtaken analyst expectations. Following the stock's surge, even the most bullish Wall Street targets now imply downside from current levels. The Street-high target of $685 per share sits below the stock's recent trading range, highlighting just how aggressively investors have bid up shares. The move underscores the market's growing conviction that AI-driven infrastructure spending will continue creating strong demand for storage solutions, benefiting companies positioned at the center of that ecosystem. Despite the stock's extraordinary gains, Wall Street continues to maintain a Strong Buy consensus rating, though analysts may need to revisit their price targets if the rally continues. Read more at TipRanks https://lnkd.in/gx_pap7a

As the Director of Contact Center Support Services and Digital Optimization at Public Storage, I lead strategic initiatives to enhance customer satisfaction, operational efficiency, and revenue growth through digitalization and innovation. With over 20 years of experience in the Digital Servicing space, I have a deep understanding of customer needs, business processes, and technology solutions. My mission is to empower customers and employees with the best digital tools and experiences possible.

About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML, NLP, LLM models into production environments with a focus on reliability and scalability. Own the full model lifecycle — from experimentation and offline evaluation through serving, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.
...

...
- Hands-on experience with Generative AI technologies: LLMs, multimodal models, RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA)
...
- Prior Experience in building GenAI, DL, Vision-based models.
...
- Strong foundation in classical ML, deep learning, and modern architectures — CNNs, Transformers, and domain-specific variants
...

high-impact AI/ML solutions to Production, including MLOps, Spark,
...

The annual salary range for this position is $117,000.00 - $234,000.00

Data science, machine learning, optimization models, Master’s degree in Machine Learning, Computer Science, Information Technology, Operations Research, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, Econometrics, Successful completion of one or more assessments in Python, Spark, Scala, or R, Using open source frameworks (for example, scikit learn, tensorflow, torch), We value candidates with a background in creating inclusive digital experiences, demonstrating knowledge in implementing Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 AA standards, assistive technologies, and integrating digital accessibility seamlessly. The ideal candidate would have knowledge of accessibility best practices and join us as we continue to create accessible products and services following Walmart’s accessibility standards and guidelines for supporting an inclusive culture.

results.title: Senior AI and Data Engineer – Publicis Groupe
highlights:
# Senior AI and Data Engineer
...
Company descriptionPublicis Groupe is one of the largest communications groups in the world. We are building the agency model of the future and take a holistic approach to our clients' challenges. By fusing together our media, creative, data and technology expertise, we are able to provide clients with integrated solutions, transformative ideas and compelling consumer experiences. We call it the Power of One.We are proud winner of many awards and nominations, both in Sweden and internationally. But nothing makes us prouder than to work with clients and brands such as P&G, Disney, H&M, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, LEGO, Spotify, Perrigo, Renault and many more.At Publicis, we put our people first. We are proud to be certified by Great Place to Work (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) and have won the Diversity Charter Sweden Awards in the category Mental Health (2025). We have also been recognized with a Magnet Award for our engaging culture (2023). Our goal is to become the leading workplace in our industry. We are based in a fantastic office in Odenplan and offer a flexible work policy. Overview As a Senior AI & Data Engineer at Publicis Intelligence, you will play a key role in our journey towards becoming a more AI-driven consulting and product organization. The role is highly hands-on and technical, while also having clear strategic impact. You will join a team with strong existing capabilities in data, analytics, MarTech and insights. Generative AI and agent-based solutions are the next major focus area in our development. You will take technical leadership within GenAI. This includes identifying opportunities, shaping solutions and driving implementations from idea to production. You will work closely with other agencies and technical stakeholders across the organization. Your mission is to design, build and deploy AI solutions that create real business value, both internally and for our clients. Internally, this means improving efficiency, automation, decision support and new ways of working. Externally, you will help develop AI-driven capabilities that strengthen our clients' businesses. You act as the bridge between business needs, strategic goals and technical delivery. You ensure that solutions are robust, scalable and commercially relevant. This role is based in Stockholm and involves close collaboration with teams in Sweden and Denmark, as well as with Publicis' global AI initiatives. Responsibilities
...
- You are responsible for developing and scaling AI and GenAI solutions that deliver clear, measurable business impact for both internal teams and clients. You own AI agents, copilots and LLM-based applications end to end, from design to production. The focus is on efficiency, scalability and the creation of new AI-driven products and services.
...
- Beyond hands-on delivery, you act as a technical advisor and enabler. You help teams and clients turn AI potential into concrete, implementable solutions. You also contribute to the development of new AI-driven products across data, analytics and MarTech.
...
- You play a key role in building AI maturity across the organization. This includes sharing knowledge, mentoring others and driving innovation within GenAI and MLOps. You help shape best practices that allow the organization to scale and evolve its AI capabilities over time.
...
- You have 5+ years of experience in Data Engineering, ML Engineering, Analytics Engineering, or similar technical roles, and are comfortable operating across the full lifecycle of data- and AI-drive systems.
...
- Extensive experience in designing data pipelines, and proficiency in SQL, Python, and spark.
...
- You have proven experience with cloud architecture and implementing scalable data infrastructure and solutions.
...
- You have a strong grasp of API design, system integration, and service-based architecture, and the ability to connect AI components into larger technical ecosystems.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform
...
Posted Jun 23, 2026
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- A Typical Day:
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
- Empowerment: Think strategically about how to scale and evolve Airbnb’s content integrity defenses, helping define the long-term vision for the role of AI-driven content understanding across the Trust ecosystem.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
- Skilled in statistical programming (Python or R) and database usage (SQL)

# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Highly skilled in quantitative programming languages including Python, R, and SQL, with practical experience working with distributed storage systems such as S3, Flash, and Vector Databases.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.
